text:
Created attachment 189126
Proposed patch (since 449591 revision)

Patch to update editors/focuswriter port from 1.6.7 to 1.6.8 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/compare/v1.6.7...v1.6.8
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/blob/v1.6.8/NEWS#L1-L5

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
